title: Ravager Drops│劫掠獸掉落物
description: Ravager will drop Beef when killed.│劫掠獸被擊殺時會掉落牛肉。
body:
# Function│功能
Ravager will drop 10-15 Raw Beef when killed, drops Steak if dying while on fire, and each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon will increase the drop limit by 3.│劫掠獸被擊殺後會掉落10-15塊生牛肉，在著火時死亡則掉落牛排，武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使掉落數量的上限+3。
